explicit_text: I was born right here in Mount Sterling, Kentucky, and have lived a fairly regular life here. I've worked in the carpentry trade all my life and have strong ties to this community. Mount Sterling is home, and it's where I found the healthcare support that changed my life.

explicit_text: The Post Clinic in Mount Sterling has been a lifesaver for me and Ryan. I first heard about it when my boss was fixing a gutter on the old building, and I ended up filling out an application and getting blood work done within days. Olga Skinner read my blood work and helped me get prescriptions quickly. Ryan also received dental care there, which transformed his smile and boosted his confidence. Accessing healthcare at the Post Clinic has been simple and life-changing for us.
